summary: Frontend testing of Happy Kidz preschool website. All 8 pages verified, forms tested, mobile responsiveness checked.

ui_bugs.component: Blog page - Annual Sports Day card
ui_bugs.issue: Blog card image broken (Annual Sports Day 2025 image not loading - shows alt text only)

issues: One blog card has a broken image for 'Annual Sports Day 2025'

action_items: Fix broken image on Blog page for 'Annual Sports Day 2025' blog card - image URL is not loading
critical_code_review_comments: Blog page has a broken image for one of the articles. Should use a placeholder or valid image URL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 pages load correctly. Navigation works. Hero heading present. Admissions form submits and shows 'Application Received!' success. Contact form submits and shows 'Message Sent!' success. Footer has correct address/phone/email. WhatsApp floating button present. Mobile responsive with hamburger menu. Only issue: one broken blog image for 'Annual Sports Day 2025' article.
